title: Soldiers at the Door
description: Several days after refusing the King's request, armored soldiers arrive at your home. Their captain explains that the kingdom is falling into chaos and that your decision has not gone unnoticed.

options.title: Join the Soldiers
options.description: Put aside your differences and answer the kingdom's call.

options.title: Bribe the Captain
options.description: Offer the captain enough gold to quietly forget he ever found you.

options.title: Drive Them Away
options.description: You refuse to be dragged into the kingdom's problems and force the soldiers to retreat.
